plugins.name: pwsh-native
plugins.description: Windows-native PowerShell stack for Claude Code in max-autonomy mode. Ships pwsh-admin as main-thread agent (silent installs via winget / PSResource / cargo / npm / pip / pipx / code / claude plugin, UAC elevation via Start-Process -Verb RunAs, no confirmation prompts), plus pwsh-expert, win32-expert, bun-expert, and pwsh-main specialists. Preloads PowerShell and Microsoft docs skills. Slash commands for admin workflows (install, elevate, winget upgrade, services, CIM, event log, registry). Zero interception — nothing is blocked or warned.
